problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
